characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. She has light brown hair tied back and blue eyes.
characters.wardrobe: Black off-the-shoulder long-sleeve top and a silver necklace with a butterfly pendant.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Brain [Brain]
Character A says: Heart [Heart]
Character A says: Lungs [Lungs]
Character A says: Liver [Liver]
Character A says: Kidneys [Kidneys]
Character A says: Stomach [Stomach]
Character A says: Intestines [Intestines]
Character A says: Pancreas [Pancreas]
Character A says: Bladder [Bladder]
Character A says: English सीखने का सबसे बड़ा झूठ ये है कि आपको और vocabulary चाहिए। [The biggest lie about learning English is that you need more vocabulary.]
Character A says: बिल्कुल नहीं। [Not at all.]
Character A says: आपको बस बोलना शुरू करना है। [You just have to start speaking.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by listing random anatomical vocabulary words.
- Debunks the common myth that memorizing vocabulary is the main barrier to fluency.
- Empowers the user by stating they just need to start speaking.

brain
heart

ENGLISH सीखने का सबसे बड़ा झूठ ये है कि आपको और VOCABULARY चाहिए। बिल्कुल नहीं। आपको बस बोलना शुरू करना है।

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Hey May, how's your day been? Any fun art projects lately? [Hey May, how's your day been? Any fun art projects lately?]
Character A says: Hello Stacy, everything's okay. I'm a bit tired and I have a lot of work. [Hello Stacy, everything's okay. I'm a bit tired and I have a lot of work.]
Character B says: Oh, that sounds like a lot. What kind of work has been keeping you busy? [Oh, that sounds like a lot. What kind of work has been keeping you busy?]
Character A says: Just a few art projects. Nothing interesting. [Just a few art projects. Nothing interesting.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core product feature (AI conversation practice).
- Shows a realistic, low-pressure practice environment where the user speaks English.
- Highlights the app's ability to understand and respond contextually.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
HEY MAY HOW'S YOUR DAY BEEN ANY FUN ART PROJECTS LATELY
HELLO STACY EVERYTHING'S OK I'M A BIT TIRED AND I HAVE A LOT OF WORK
OH THAT SOUNDS LIKE A LOT WHAT KIND OF WORK HAS BEEN KEEPING YOU BUSY

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: इसीलिए Supernova काम करता है। [That's why Supernova works.]
Character A says: ये आपके फ़ोन में एक real speaking partner की तरह है। [It's like a real speaking partner in your phone.]
Character A says: तो सिर्फ़ English सीखना छोड़ो, और Supernova app के साथ English बोलना शुरू करो। [So stop just learning English, and start speaking English with the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the core value proposition of having a speaking partner in your pocket.
- Shifts the mindset from passive learning to active speaking.
- Provides a clear call-to-action to download Supernova.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
इसीलिए SUPERNOVA काम करता है। ये आपके फ़ोन में एक REAL SPEAKING PARTNER की तरह है। तो सिर्फ़ ENGLISH सीखना छोड़ो, और SUPERNOVA APP के साथ ENGLISH बोलना शुरू करो।
Supernova - AI English Tutor
Learn and practice speaking
